speaker: rep
text: Hi Sarah, thanks for taking the time to chat today. I really appreciate it.

speaker: prospect
text: Sure, no problem. I have about 20 minutes.

speaker: rep
text: Perfect. So, um, I wanted to, like, understand a bit more about how your team currently handles outbound prospecting.

speaker: prospect
text: We have a team of about 12 SDRs. They mostly use email sequences and LinkedIn.

speaker: rep
text: Got it. And how's that working out for you in terms of reply rates?

speaker: prospect
text: Honestly, not great. Our reply rates have dropped to about 3% over the last quarter.

speaker: rep
text: Yeah so basically what we do is we have this really amazing platform that uses AI to personalize outreach at scale and it integrates with your CRM and it can also do multi-channel sequencing across email and LinkedIn and phone and it has analytics dashboards and it basically automates the whole process end to end so your reps can focus on actually having conversations instead of doing manual work all day.

speaker: prospect
text: Okay... that's a lot. Can you back up a bit?

speaker: rep
text: Oh sure, sorry about that. What specifically caught your interest?

speaker: prospect
text: You mentioned AI personalization. What does that actually look like in practice?

speaker: rep
text: Great question. So the AI analyzes prospect data from LinkedIn, company news, and job postings to craft personalized opening lines.

speaker: prospect
text: Interesting. We actually evaluated Outreach and SalesLoft last quarter but neither really solved the personalization problem for us.

speaker: rep
text: Yeah, um, I totally get that. So, like, our approach is, you know, different because we use more sophisticated models.

speaker: prospect
text: How is your approach different from what Outreach offers? They also claim AI personalization.

speaker: rep
text: Reps can review and edit before sending. There's an approval workflow built in.

speaker: prospect
text: That's good. What about integration with HubSpot? That's our CRM.

speaker: rep
text: We have a native HubSpot integration. Two-way sync for contacts, deals, and activities.

speaker: prospect
text: And pricing? What does this typically run?

speaker: rep
text: So our pricing starts at $89 per seat per month and then we have a growth tier at $149 and an enterprise tier at $249 and there are also add-ons for the AI features and the analytics module is separate and we also have implementation fees depending on your CRM complexity.

speaker: prospect
text: That's quite a range. Which tier would make sense for a team our size?

speaker: rep
text: For 12 SDRs, most teams go with the growth tier. But honestly, it depends on your specific needs.

speaker: prospect
text: What kind of results do similar companies see?

speaker: rep
text: Teams like yours typically see reply rates go from 3% to about 8-12% within the first 90 days.

speaker: prospect
text: That would be significant. What would next steps look like?

speaker: rep
text: I'd love to set up a demo with your team lead. Would Thursday or Friday work?

speaker: prospect
text: Thursday afternoon works. Send me a calendar invite.
